name: The Clubhouse Indoor Golf World
about: The Clubhouse Indoor Golf World is a 3,300-square-foot facility in Murrieta featuring three standard bays with 15-foot screens and a premium 19th Hole Suite. It provides a blend of technology and social entertainment, offering access to over 2,000 world-class golf courses, interactive sports games, and private event options. Pricing is flexible with hourly rates for bays and a membership program starting at $49 per month, while also offering special discounts and a private bar.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium GS Pro course library with ultra-realistic physics
The exclusive 19th Hole Suite with a 21-foot curved-screen simulator
A wide variety of interactive games and non-golf sports options
Private bar with over 35 beers, seltzers, and specialty cocktails

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service on site.
Private bar with a selection of over 35 beers, seltzers, and specialty canned cocktails.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium technology used in the 19th Hole Suite and 2 standard bays.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, so it's recommended to call them directly to inquire.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a private bar on site serving a selection of over 35 beers, seltzers, and specialty canned cocktails.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time estimate for playing 18 holes, as time varies based on player skill and game mode chosen.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Clubhouse is described as a place for everyone, with interactive games like soccer, dodgeball, and mini-golf that are hits with kids of all ages.
